subject: General Education
description: Math, English, and reading — LET common coverage.

questions.q: A class of 5 students got scores of 45, 45, 45, 60, and 60. What is the mean score?

options: The teacher, along with her students, are in the room.
The teacher, along with her students, is in the room.
The teacher along with her students were in the room.
The teacher, along with her students, be in the room.
questions.explanation: The subject is "the teacher" (singular); the phrase after "along with" does not change the verb.

questions.q: Choose the word closest in meaning to LUCID.
questions.explanation: Lucid means clear and easy to understand.

questions.q: A rectangle has a perimeter of 36 cm and a length of 11 cm. What is its width?
What is the value of x if 2x + 5 = 17?

questions.explanation: Abundant means plentiful — the opposite of scarce.
